metadata.description: Shared brand and marketing resources for social.plus. Two plugins: marketing-team (14 skills, full kit) and branding (3 skills, for non-marketing colleagues).

plugins.name: marketing-team
plugins.description: All shared skills for the marketing team.

plugins.name: branding
plugins.description: The minimum on-brand kit for social.plus — brand voice, press releases, and design system. For non-marketing teammates who need to stay on-brand.
